items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE New Bucket Bag
Louise is crafted from calfskin suede with a sleek, fluid bucket silhouette. The deep background highlights the exquisite, sparkling gold Triomphe triumph logo, presenting a relaxed and casual temperament. The bag features a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, offering ample capacity for daily commuting, business trips, and office work without any pressure🤎
Style: 116613
Color: Grey (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 28x24x16

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CABAS ANAIS Grain Calfskin Handbag👜 Small. CE's latest tote bag. A different kind of tote.
It looks exceptionally high-end and refined, with a lazy vintage vibe. Simple and understated. It is incredibly practical. Grain calfskin is completely worry-free regarding scratches 🫶🏻 Perfect for forgetful besties~ The side ears can be adjusted freely, and it easily fits a laptop 📒 or daily essentials when open.
Features one main compartment
One interior flat pocket
Two long leather handles
Includes a long shoulder strap
Style: 118613
Color: Light Apricot
Dimensions: 20.5(Opening 35)x9x19cm
💰:

Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE TRIOMPHE Kelly Handbag👜
New Triomphe Clutch, Full of High-end Feel!
Simple and exquisite silhouette, whether it is steady black, low-key brown, classic monogram color scheme, etc... all exude incomparable high-end feel❤️ Kelly's classic lines are simple and generous, no need for extra decoration, all showing aesthetic charm🫶🏻
Style No.: 118113 Grey Color
Dimensions: 20.5x13x8 (Comes with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival AA
When talking about the 24 Fall/Winter runway, the mirror-like pieces are sure to catch the eye 👁️ Clean, elegant lines, minimalist design and silhouette interplay. If you can only choose one piece, you must choose this TERENCE. The iconic TRIOMPHE logo element, gentle and elegant, patent calfskin, unique luster and recognizability - A petite and fun shape, perfect for hand or shoulder carry ❇️
TRIOMPHE snap closure, 1 main compartment
1 interior flat pocket
1 adjustable leather handle
Style No.: 118313
Color: Black
Size: 21x5.5x11cm

items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️
CELINE New Arrival. TRIOMPHE CANVAS logo print
Flip top with decorative TRIOMPHE lock, snap closure, 1 main compartment, 1 flat pocket, detachable chain strap, and adjustable leather shoulder strap. Multiple carrying styles. Easily fits daily essentials like phone, lipstick, and keys. Three-in-one design, definitely a crowd favorite 🫶🏻 Perfect for all occasions!
Style: 10L972 Rice Brown
Size: 20.5x11x4 (with original packaging)
